entity.summary: Moonbeam automated-market-maker exchange associated with the Beamex perpetuals ecosystem, preserved through substantial cumulative DEX volume but without sufficient recent activity evidence for an active classification.
entity.notes: Current registry data preserves Beamex AMM as a Moonbeam exchange and reports roughly $75 million in cumulative DEX volume. The reviewed profile does not expose current recent-volume or liquidity metrics, and a stable first-party application URL was not recovered. HEI therefore uses limited rather than active or dead.

evidence.title: Beamex AMM protocol profile
evidence.notes: Current protocol data identifies Beamex AMM as a Moonbeam decentralized exchange associated with perpetual trading.

evidence.title: Beamex AMM DEX discovery entry
evidence.notes: DEX discovery data preserves the Beamex AMM identity and Moonbeam chain association.

evidence.title: Beamex AMM cumulative volume record
evidence.notes: The current profile preserves substantial cumulative DEX volume but does not provide strong recent-activity evidence, supporting a limited classification.
